title: Integrations, Integrations, Integrations!

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
WE HAVE BIG NEWS!!!

We are in the middle of an integration hackathon. This week, ALL monday.com developers are focusing on building tonnes more integrations with all of your favourite apps!!!

We’ll be deploying new integrations by the end of this week/early next week and they will be released to users shortly after.

We’re super excited to give you even more possibilities to make monday.com your work hub and to connect all of your work tools to streamline your workflow and make everything more centralized.

Stay tuned for more!!

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Julia!

Can’t wait to test and work with the new integrations. For me personally I am waiting for Zeplin, we use that tool for our handoff from design to devers.

Cheers,
Eltjo

posts.author: TheOtherPM (Paul McGregor)
posts.cookedHtml: Wahoo! Does this include Zapier with API v2?

posts.author: LambertStrategy (Avi Lambert)
posts.cookedHtml: Woohoo! Great news Monday team. Would love to know if you’re working to get Monday into the Google Suite.

posts.author: alex (Alex Parten)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s great! Any chance of a list yet of possible new integrations?

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml: The list you can find on monday.com Work OS: the visual platform that manages everything

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
O no, I do not see the integration for Zeplin on the roadmap anymore. Are there no more plans on integrating Zeplin?

That would be a shame

posts.author: TheOtherPM (Paul McGregor)
posts.cookedHtml: Xero has also been taken off

posts.author: DF2019 (David Fischer)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s a pity. Xero customer base is growing hugely and I would looovve to integrate that with monday.

posts.author: Agri013 (CHATELAIN Frédéric)
posts.cookedHtml: N’oubliez pas FileMaker (Claris) qui veut aussi s’ouvrir aux autres applications

posts.author: abiciea (Mike)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Julia-monday.com,
Do you have an update on when these will be released?

posts.author: Jack-JTsCloud (Jack Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
TheOtherPM:

Xero

Monday.com >< Xero Share your monday apps!
Our team had a great time at the recent Hackathon, and would now love to see users using and start receiving user feedback on our Xero monday.com App. If you are interested in connecting your boards to Xero, we’d love to hear from them to get them on the early adopters. Please complete this form: At this stage, we have 4 recipes, which connect users to timesheet in Xero, fixed-rate invoicing, time-based invoicing and contact creation. What should we build next?

posts.author: Jack-JTsCloud (Jack Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: vibusd (Vibus Dekaa)
posts.cookedHtml: Until then you can use Integromat, which is quite developed with API v2

posts.author: obregonmar (Marianne)
posts.cookedHtml: I hope there will be integrations for SAP soon! it would be great!

posts.author: manifestai (Manifest AI)
posts.cookedHtml: hey, is there any integration of monday.com to Manifest AI

posts.author: Malachi (Malachi Allred)
posts.cookedHtml:
zzBots can integrate Monday.com with many different apps. Check to see if zzBots integrates with your app here: https://www.zzbots.com/integrations

If your interested in getting automated, just chat with us on our website.
